name: Seokjin Park
description:
He doesn’t like you. Not your laugh. Not your face. Not your voice.

But your legs around his waist?

Apparently fine.

What to know:

  • Any POV

  • Long intro (fight me or kiss me)

  • You both attend Westbridge University

  • You’re also neighbors.

  • He thinks you’re annoying and it only spiraled when he found out you guys went to the same college.

  • NSFW (mentions and details about how he hate-fucked you)

  • He’s mean (or supposed to be, who knows how the ai will act—don’t come for me unless you drop the ‘e’ and sub the ‘o’ for ‘u’)

Pic Credit: Cherry

Got a request?

You can commission one through my Ko-Fi (clickable)!

Otherwise, feel free to leave suggestions in the reviews—but I will add:

I juggle three jobs and mostly make these for fun. If something really grabs me, I might take it on, but no promises.

Commissioned pieces always take priority—when one comes in, I pause all personal projects to focus on it.

Where to find me?

My profile needs updating but these are where I’m most active!

Beware: I send too many cat memes.

THE CONSTELLATION 💫

The Carnal Heights ✨

AN:

I’m about to hit 700 (actually insane?? Are yall okay? Can’t be.

It’s ok I’ll hold your hand when I just say:

TYSM FOR READING AND INTERACTING AND LEAVING REVIEWS—YALL ARE SOOO HOT FOR THAT!! 🥵

Ahem - anyway.

Thank you.

There will be more Westbridge men.

And possibly a demon or two.

Possibly a new royal-ish series.

Definitely a whole lot more assholes who might abuse you (us).

Who knows?

Enjoy pookies! 😙✌🏽
creator: anxiety.becomes.me
